examples.title: Algorithm: Hyperledger Fabric
examples.description: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic structure of Hyperledger Fabric.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic structure of Hyperledger Fabric, including initializing the fabric, creating a new block, adding the block to the blockchain, and validating the blockchain.

examples.title: Algorithm: Hyperledger Sawtooth
examples.description: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic structure of Hyperledger Sawtooth.
examples.explanation: This pseudocode demonstrates the basic structure of Hyperledger Sawtooth, including initializing the sawtooth, creating a new transaction, adding the transaction to the blockchain, and validating the blockchain.
